arguments.expression: console.log('=== Enhanced matchMedia Test ==='); try { const queries = ['(max-width: 600px)', '(min-width: 768px)', '(max-width: 1024px)', '(orientation: landscape)', '(orientation: portrait)', 'screen', 'print', '(min-width: 1200px) and (max-width: 1600px)', '(max-width: 500px), (min-width: 1000px)']; queries.forEach(query => { const mql = window.matchMedia(query); console.log(`Query: "${query}" -> matches: ${mql.matches}`); }); console.log('\n=== Testing complex queries ==='); const complex1 = window.matchMedia('(min-width: 1000px) and (orientation: landscape)'); console.log('Complex AND query matches:', complex1.matches); const complex2 = window.matchMedia('(max-width: 500px), (min-width: 1500px)'); console.log('Complex OR query matches:', complex2.matches); } catch (e) { console.log('❌ Error:', e.message); }
